name: Elowen 2 Door Cabinet - Threshold™
description:
Revamp any space with a functional organization piece, the Elowen 2 Door Cabinet from Threshold™. This cabinet stands on four metal legs in a brass finish for a classic look. The wooden doors in a neutral shade complement the frame and open to shelves that give you ample space for photos and other items. You can place the cabinet in your entryway, living room or any other area.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
